caveats.recorded_issue: The affected files record generated_from_head/tree as the pre-final R15-009 head/tree rather than the audited final R15 head/tree.
caveats.disposition: proof-package hygiene weakness, not a fatal acceptance blocker
caveats.reason_not_fatal: The remote branch and final tree were independently verified as audited head d9685030a0556a528684d28367db83f4c72f7fc9 and audited tree 7529230df0c1f5bec3625ba654b035a2af824e9b.

non_claims: This post-audit packet does not implement R16.
This post-audit packet does not open R16.
This post-audit packet does not merge R15 to main.
This post-audit packet does not change R15 scope.
This post-audit packet does not claim product runtime.

This post-audit packet does not claim real agents, true multi-agent execution, persistent memory, runtime loading, retrieval, vector search, productized UI, board runtime, board routing runtime, card re-entry runtime, workflow execution, PM automation, integrations, solved Codex compaction, or solved Codex reliability.
